title: Korean Chocolate Fondue
description: A sweet and indulgent dessert made with melted chocolate and served with crunchy Korean-style rice cakes.
instructions: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Once melted, stir in the Nutella and Korean chili flakes (if using).
Place the melted chocolate mixture into a small fondue pot or a heatproof bowl.
Arrange the rice cakes on a platter or individual plates.
Serve the fondue with the rice cakes and enjoy!
Dip the rice cakes into the chocolate fondue and enjoy the sweet and spicy combination.
If the chocolate starts to harden, reheat it gently and adjust the consistency as needed.
